title: cacalia subglabrata
intro: Cacalia subglabrata, also known as the smooth-leaved cacalia, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and swelling, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Cacalia subglabrata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
